bullets: Eighteen house church leaders in China held without trial for over six months, denied Bibles and facing lengthy sentences under sustained government crackdown.
Christian and Jewish communities in France facing a dramatic surge in physical assaults, vandalism, and anti-religious attacks recorded by government authorities.
Indonesian congregation forcibly dispersed by extremists during Sunday worship over disputed permits, their freedom to gather remaining uncertain.
Thousands of Malaysian Christian congregations threatened with loss of commercial worship spaces under new state zoning rules barring non-Muslim religious use.
Sri Lankan Christians attacked by stone-throwing assailants during an evening prayer gathering, sustaining damage to their place of worship.
Montagnard Christian minority men detained in Vietnam on charges linking religious activity to separatism, amid a sustained government campaign against ethnic minority believers.
Christians in Punjab, India remaining displaced and destitute years after wrongful arrests under sacrilege laws, with an expanded statute now threatening even harsher penalties.
Twa Christians in eastern DR Congo mourning at least seven community members killed in an overnight militant attack, with a religious leader also taken captive.
Hindu nationalist violence disrupting Christian gatherings across India, with convention attendees detained, mourners beaten at a graveside, and communities facing burial bans and social exclusion.

Nigerian Christian communities in the Middle Belt mourning eight killed and fifteen wounded in an armed attack following evening worship, and families still grieving fifty killed in the 2022 church massacre.
Civilians across Lebanon — including women, pregnant mothers, displaced families, and medical workers — facing ongoing airstrikes, displacement, and a fragile ceasefire that has yet to hold

Tens of thousands of civilians in Ukraine, including children, grieving losses and sheltering from relentless overnight missile and drone strikes on residential buildings, schools, and energy infrastructure
Civilians in Kuwait and across Gulf states caught in escalating Iranian missile and drone strikes, with one person killed, dozens injured, and critical infrastructure damaged
Millions of Iranians facing severe water shortages and damaged civilian infrastructure following conflict and years of drought
Civilians in eastern Congo trapped between ongoing armed violence and an active Ebola outbreak that is blocking humanitarian and health access
Schoolchildren and teachers in north-eastern Nigeria living in fear of abduction, with dozens of children still missing after a mass kidnapping
Christian farming communities and Muslim herders in Nigeria's Middle Belt caught in cycles of deadly violence driven by deep religious and ethnic divisions
Rohingya refugees in Bangladesh — over one million people — facing collapse of basic services as international aid funding runs dangerously low
Sudanese refugee women in the remote border region of the Central African Republic facing life-threatening childbirth conditions amid overwhelmed clinics and funding cuts
Opposition defendants and political prisoners in Tunisia facing life sentences amid a sweeping crackdown on dissent
People of Somalia caught between armed political factions and street unrest as a deepening constitutional crisis threatens civilian safety
Mozambican migrant workers in South Africa killed and displaced by xenophobic violence, with hundreds left homeless after attacks
Migrant farm workers in southern Italy vulnerable to lethal violence and exploitation, with four workers killed in an arson attack
Communities in Ethiopia's excluded northern region denied political participation for six years, with no federal representation following a devastating civil war
Families and residents in the United Kingdom's port city shaken by street violence, grief, and community fracture following a young student's murder
Families in Iowa devastated by a domestic mass shooting that killed six members of one family
Residents of a California city recovering from a prolonged hostage crisis at a public building

Communities in the Democratic Republic of Congo and neighboring Uganda facing a rapidly spreading Bundibugyo Ebola outbreak with nearly 250 deaths, over 1,000 suspected cases, no approved vaccine, and strained healthcare access in conflict-affected areas.
Residents of Kenya where two people were fatally shot during protests over a proposed Ebola isolation facility, leaving families grieving and communities deeply divided.
Residents across multiple US states dealing with a damaging hailstorm in Colorado, seismic activity felt across California and Hawaii, and a sonic boom event over Massachusetts.
Communities in Vanuatu, Indonesia, Fiji, Japan, El Salvador, New Zealand, and Italy living in seismically active zones following a series of earthquakes in recent days.
